abilities: I don't fly, nobody flies. (hooking airborne enemy)
Eat dirt. (hooking enemy using movement-based ability)
Brought down. (hooking enemy using movement-based ability)
chatter: Hope you geezers can fight. (with multiple older heroes on team: Ana , Reaper , Reinhardt , Sigma , Soldier: 76 or Torbjörn )
I wanna fly... (with Echo , Pharah and Mercy on team)

More like Over-rated . *chuckle* (all other heroes in your team being current or former members of Overwatch : Ana , Cassidy , Echo , Genji , Mei , Mercy , Reinhardt , Soldier: 76 , Sojourn , Torbjörn , Tracer , or Winston )
"Oh no, it's Talon!" *laughs* (with only Talon members on the team)
What am I, a baby sitter? (with multiple young heroes on team: Brigitte , D.Va , Illari , Junkrat , Kiriko , or Lúcio )
You eggheads stay away from me. (with multiple scientists on team: Lifeweaver , Mei , Mercy , Moira , Sigma or Winston )
Just need to win one more.
I hate the cold. (eliminated by Mei )
Just keep knocking 'em off. (getting environmental kills in previous fight)
Took 'em long enough. *chuckle* (eliminated with Kill Streak)
eliminations: I'm tired of hearing your voice. (eliminating Junkrat )
Now will you shut up? (eliminating Junkrat )
Blockin' my sun. (eliminating Lúcio , Mercy or Zenyatta )
Big target, heh. (eliminating Reinhardt or Winston )
Coulda left my gun at home.
Never count me out. (on low HP)
Close. But I'm the better hog. (on low HP, eliminating another Roadhog )
Hook, headshot, done. (eliminating hooked enemy with headshot)
Leave 'em dead this time. (eliminating recently resurrected hero)
Got my wings. (eliminating enemy while airborne)
Feeling quick. (eliminating enemy using movement-based ability)
I'm fast, too. (eliminating enemy using movement-based ability)
Don't try the bubble on me. (eliminating enemy while protected by Particle Barrier or Projected Barrier )
My base now. (eliminating Overwatch heroes on Watchpoint: Gibraltar )
Amplified. (eliminating enemy by shooting through Baptiste 's Amplification Matrix)
Stop rolling, cowboy. (eliminating Cassidy using Combat Roll)
Fastest hog in the West. (eliminating Cassidy using Deadeye)
Too bright. No thanks. (eliminating Illari using Captive Sun)
Got the imposter, ma'am. (eliminating Junker Queen , while having a Junker Queen on your team)
Don't like your voice. (eliminating Lúcio using Sound Barrier)
Mm, plucked wings. (eliminating Mercy using Valkyrie)
Never liked science. (eliminating Moira using Coalescence, Sigma using Gravitic Flux, or Zarya using Graviton Surge)
No, no, no. (eliminating Reaper using Death Blossom)
My castle now. (eliminating Reinhardt on Eichenwalde )
I aim fine on my own. (eliminating Soldier: 76 using Tactical Visor)
Chill, bro. (eliminating Winston using Primal Rage)
My moon now. (eliminating Winston on Horizon Lunar Colony )
Get the gist? (eliminating a hero you eliminated before without dying)
Thick as a brick. (After surviving heavy damage)
Someday I'm just going to leave you. (to Junkrat )
I wouldn't fall for that. (eliminating Roadhog )
That little piggy fell all the way home. (eliminating Roadhog )
Boost out of that. (eliminating Nano-Boosted enemy)
About time you did something useful.
Not bad for a nice guy. (to any Overwatch members)
interactions: Roadhog: Stay out of trouble, Nana. Ana: As long as you get into plenty. Roadhog: *laughs* Yes, ma'am.
Roadhog : I hate it here. Baptiste : ...Then you can hate it anywhere!
Brigitte: Isn't it reckless to pull enemies towards us? Roadhog: *laughs* Afraid of getting too close? Brigitte: Nope, just thinking of the team. It would help if you did too.
Roadhog: Cute mech . D.Va: Cute hook! Roadhog: Heh.
Roadhog: You look rich. Hanzo: I gave up my father 's empire ...and his fortune alongside it. Roadhog: Shame.
Junker Queen: Mako, the Wreckers want you back. Thought you might like to know. Roadhog: *meaningful grunt* Junker Queen: Ha! They'll hate that. I'll pass it along.
Roadhog: Say bacon one more time. Junkrat: "Bacon, one more time."
Kiriko: I like your mask! Roadhog: *grunt* Kiriko: I said I like your mask, dude. Roadhog: Okay.
Lifeweaver : With how often we pull people around, we could start a transportation service! Roadhog : How much are we charging? Lifeweaver : Let's discuss the details over tea.
Lúcio: Hey, big man, you got any requests? Roadhog: A little silence would be nice.
Lúcio: I think I've added too much bass to my new track. Roadhog: No such thing.
Lúcio: So, I'm trying to ask everybody this. What is your favorite animal? Roadhog: Pachimari . Lúcio: Uh... yeah, I can see it!
Mauga : How are the rates for mercenaries down there? Roadhog : Modest. Mauga : Tsk, no one pays what we're worth.

Mauga : If it isn't my favorite piggie pal! Been up to no good lately? Roadhog : I'm not your pal. Mauga : Well, how about swine sibling? My ham slice? Porkie pie? Roadhog : How about shut your snout?
Mercy : Are you sure that gas you inhale is safe? Roadhog : It tastes good.
Moira: Are you breathing petrol , or something more interesting? Roadhog: Want some ? Moira: No, thank you. I'll just observe.
Roadhog: Get a big payout for scrapping you. Orisa: Hmph. You may certainly try. Roadhog: Think I won't? Orisa: I think you can't.
Pharah: You stole a lot of things that Helix was supposed to protect. Roadhog: What's it to you? Pharah: My unit would have eaten you alive. Roadhog: *chuckle*
Reaper: You got a problem, Junker? Roadhog: Yeah. *wet sounds*
Sojourn: Follow my lead, and we make it out of here in one piece. Roadhog: Watch the high ground. Sojourn: Huh, I didn't take you for a tactician. Roadhog: Used to it.
Sojourn : I remember Overwatch tailing you back in the day. Before you teamed up with your... sidekick. Roadhog : Quieter times.
Roadhog : I saw you at Calaveras . Sombra : They let you in there? Well... I guess no one was going to stop you.
Torbjörn: *sighs* I guess it takes all kinds to make a world. Roadhog: *grunts*
map-specific: I should make movies. Easy money.
